## Agent Checklist

- [ ] Scope is narrow and intentional.
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or local `.env` values were committed.
- [ ] Conventional commit format was used for every commit in this PR.
- [ ] Touched scripts stayed roughly within the `500-700` line guardrail, or the exception is justified here.
- [ ] Existing files were edited in preference to creating unnecessary new ones.
- [ ] Tests or manual validation were recorded above.
- [ ] Runtime-impacting changes include a clear restart, recovery, or rollback note.
